---
status: draft
shortDescription: "A static method call is dispatched polymorphically at runtime based on the argument types"
concepts:
  - Method
  - Call
  - Polymorphism
  - Parameter
  - Type
related:
# - id: LiteralNoExpression
#   relation: Special case
inOtherPl:
# - pl: JavaScript
#   id: StaticCallPolymorphic
# - pl: Python
#   id: StaticCallPolymorphic
spec:
# - id: jls13
#   sections: ["11.8"]
plVersion:
# from: jls8
# to: jls14
---
When calling a static method `m(x)`, Java at runtime finds and invokes the static method `m(...)` with the type corresponding to the dynamic type of `x`.

frontmatter.shortDescription: A static method call is dispatched polymorphically at runtime based on the argument types
